caseStudy.title: DevSecOps Transformation
caseStudy.description: Embedding security into the software delivery lifecycle.
caseStudy.overview: Security reviews were a bottleneck in the client's software delivery pipeline, occurring only at release time and routinely delaying deployments. The goal was to shift security left — integrating automated checks throughout the CI/CD pipeline without slowing delivery velocity.
caseStudy.problem: Security vulnerabilities were discovered late in the release cycle, often requiring significant rework. The security team was overwhelmed with manual reviews, and developers had limited visibility into the security implications of their code changes.
caseStudy.solution: SAST, DAST, and dependency scanning tools were integrated directly into the CI pipeline, providing developers with immediate feedback on security issues. A developer security portal was built to track findings, assign ownership, and measure remediation velocity. Security champions were embedded in each product team.

results.summary: Security is now a first-class citizen in the delivery process. Developers report higher confidence in their releases, and the security team has shifted from firefighting to strategic advisory work.
